relative_path: PERSONNEL/Lab Management team /Role descriptions /Role description Research coordinator.docx
full_text:
Research coordinator responsibilities in Färkkilä lab

Lab budget monitoring and planning

Lab meeting scheduling and planning

HR administration

Contracts (salary, grant, ERASMUS etc.)

Keycards, UH user accounts, access to network services (Slack, GDrive, calendars, network drives etc.)

MSc student/intern recruitment coordination

Coordination of senior/staff recruitment processes

Office seating arrangements

Any issues related to contracts or access permissions

Support functions

Scientific

Scientific writing

Data presentation

Experiment planning

Other

Wellbeing of PhD/MSc students

IT supply orders

Meeting room reservations

Key resources for functions:

In HR-related matters, approach Päivi Sinisalo: paivi.sinisalo@helsinki.fi

Unless related to grant researchers’ matters in relation to UH, in which case approach Tarja Myllyntaus (only works Tue-Thu): tarja.myllyntaus@helsinki.fi

In keycard/physical access rights issues, contact Anne Simola: anne.simola@helsinki.fi

Room reservations are done through Optime: optime.helsinki.fi, or via the Outlook app (not browser) by scheduling a new meeting.

Note: Anne Simola administers the Anatomy and Pharmacology meeting rooms. If you wish to book either of these rooms, send an email to anne.simola@helsinki.fi
